name: Estlink 2 Severance
description: Loss of Estlink 2 submarine cable (650 MW). Modeled after Dec 2024 Eagle S incident.

expected_impacts.EE: Loss of 650 MW import capacity from Finland. N-1 margin significantly reduced.
expected_impacts.FI: Minor — Finland is nearly self-sufficient. Reduced export revenue.

historical_reference: 2024-12-25 Eagle S incident. Estlink 2 offline for ~6 months.
